sutta: [Music] the buddha said monks there are these 5 ways of putting away malice or ill will whereby all malice arisen in among ought to be put away what 5 monks in whatsoever person malice is engendered in him good will ought to be made to become more in this way malice in him ought to be put away monks in whomsoever malice is engendered inhibiti or compassion ought to be made to become more equanimity ought to be made to become more in whomsoever medicines and gender in that man unmindfulness inattention ought to be brought about in this way malice in him ought to be put away monks in whomsoever malice is engendered in that man the fact that he is the owner of his karma ought to be fixed in mind and 1 should think this reference referencer is the owner of his karma heir to his karma born of his karma related to his karma abide supported by his comer whatever kama he shall do for good or for evil of that he shall be the heir in this way malice in him ought to be put away verily monks these are the 5 ways of putting away malice that's the end of the sutra this not only applies to monks in connection with monks also for lay people it is quite easy for ill will to arise and again somebody so the first 1 the buddha said now we should develop goodwill metta [Music] and the meta meditation is 1 of the very beneficial meditations we should practice make it a habit and to feel good will always [Music] the second 1 we practice uh compassion of pity and the nexuta you can see why the buddha mentioned compassion and then the third 1 is equanimity equanimity can be developed stronger if we develop samadhi when we practice meditation when we practice samadhi equanimity becomes quite pronounced and quite strong and if we practice samadhi often becomes part of our nature to be tranquil to be economist and the fourth 1 if you of in the above the first 3 ways can be put into practice when we use inattention that means we just ignore that person in into towards whom we feel malice and the fourth 1 we should remember that everybody is the owner of his karma heir to his karma born of his kama related to his karma by supported by his comer so when we think in those terms when we feel that somebody has done us wrong then we think that whatever wrong he he does to us he has to bear the consequences of his wrong action so that's another way we put down our ill will so these are the 5 ways the first 1 to develop more meta good will the second 1 compassion the third 1 equanimity the fourth 1 inattention the fifth 1 to remember that he's the owner of his karma the next
